title: Optimization Process Flow for Linear Systems
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process for solving optimization problems using linear algebra techniques, such as linear programming and least squares solutions.
elements: Formulate into Standard Form (Maximize/Minimize cTx subject to Ax ≤ b, x ≥ 0)
Apply Simplex Method or Interior-Point Method
Find Optimal Solution (Vertex of Feasible Region)
relationships: Sequential process flow from problem definition to solution verification
Iterative refinement loop between application of method and finding solution
Feasibility check gates the application of optimization methods
